scores.notes: OCR output is severely garbled with most text unreadable. Company name partially recognizable as 'Book Ta * (Tamandaya)Sou bid' vs correct 'BOOK TA .K (TAMAN DAYA) SDN BHD'. Overall extraction quality is very poor with extensive character corruption and fragmented text.
